prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime concert illustration of Hatsune Miku on a massive futuristic stage, viewed from a very low angle so she looks towering and heroic. She is a petite virtual idol with long glowing turquoise twin-tails streaming outward like translucent ribbons, bright teal eyes, pale skin, and a confident playful smile. She wears a glossy black and gray cyber-idol outfit with a sleeveless metallic bodice, short pleated skirt with luminous turquoise triangular panels, black thigh-high boots, detached translucent sleeves, futuristic arm panels, a headset microphone, and small angular hair accessories. Her right hand reaches toward the viewer while a microphone cable loops dynamically across the foreground. Surround her with intense cyan and electric-blue light trails, sparkling particles, lens flares, laser beams, and transparent holographic fabric shapes swirling around her body. The background is a packed nighttime stadium concert with glowing audience light sticks, LED screens, rigging arcs, spotlights, and bursts of stage lighting in cyan with small magenta accents. Use high-contrast cinematic lighting, glossy reflections on the stage floor, deep black shadows, vibrant neon glow, sharp anime linework, highly detailed rendering, energetic composition, and a spectacular near-future virtual idol live performance atmosphere. No text, no watermark.
